ComplyAdvantage hiring Regional Marketing Manager - APAC in Singapore, Singapore | LinkedIn

### Regional Marketing Manager - APAC

ComplyAdvantage Singapore, Singapore

Apply

# Regional Marketing Manager - APAC

#### ComplyAdvantage Singapore, Singapore 2 weeks ago Over 200 applicants See who ComplyAdvantage has hired for this role

Apply

Save

- Report this job

The Regional Marketing Manager, APAC serves as the voice of marketing in the APAC region. You will partner closely with regional sales teams, execute localised activation plans and events, tailor content for regional relevance and feed key market and competitive insights back into the business. While our global marketing team builds campaigns, content, branding and paid programs, this role is all about orchestration, regional execution and local impact. You will own the regional marketing budget, track performance, optimise local programmes and build strong alignment with the APAC sales organisation.What you’ll do:

- Develop and strengthen regional relationships and partnerships by identifying opportunities for co-marketing with local ecosystems such as industry associations, influencers and channel or partner networks.
- Track, measure and communicate performance of all regional marketing initiatives by reporting on pipeline contribution, event ROI, marketing-influenced leads and other key metrics to both regional sales leadership and the global marketing team.
- Ensure brand consistency and governance across all regional initiatives by aligning every activity with global brand guidelines, messaging and marketing frameworks.
- Manage regional vendors, partners and agencies by coordinating logistics for events, negotiating sponsorship deals, overseeing execution and managing translation and localisation services.
- Build and execute regional marketing plans aligned with global strategy by setting regional goals, defining timelines and metrics and adjusting based on local market conditions and performance.
- Monitor the regional competitive landscape and market trends to identify emerging opportunities, local nuances, and regulatory changes, feeding actionable insights back into the global marketing team to shape future strategy and content.
- Act as the key liaison between the global marketing team and the APAC sales organisation to ensure sales understand target markets, personas and campaig
role_fit_rationale: Regional marketing manager in fintech/regtech SaaS; matches seniority, industry, and title preferences well.
skills_match_rationale: Strong B2B demand gen, campaign orchestration, sales alignment, vendor management, and analytics directly applicable.
company_snapshot: ComplyAdvantage is a global regtech/fintech SaaS company. No Glassdoor or NodeFlair reviews found for them—sparse data.
red_flags: 200+ applicants; company reviews unavailable for assessment
standout_positives: Regional APAC scope; SaaS fintech; strong career progression signal

Denodo is a leader in data management. The award-winning Denodo Platform is the leading data integration, management, and delivery platform using a logical approach to enable self- service BI, data science, hybrid/multi-cloud data integration, and enterprise data services. Realizing more than 400% ROI and millions of dollars in benefits, Denodo’s large enterprise and mid-market customers across 30+ industries have received payback in less than 6 months. For more information, visit www.denodo.com .We are a fast-growing, international organization with teams across four continents and we work with a cutting-edge technology, but that's not all we have to offer. At Denodo, we are like a family and it is of the utmost importance to us that we help support your professional growth every step of the wayJob DescriptionDenodo is looking for an experienced, highly motivated, and detail-oriented individual to join the marketing team. The selected candidate will be primarily responsible for planning, developing and executing demand generation campaigns to drive pipeline generation and acceleration - ensuring they meet sales and marketing goals and targets, are accomplished with excellence, and within budget through effective management of timelines, resources, and processes.Job Responsibilities & DutiesOur candidate is a versatile player with the skills necessary to execute the following responsibilities successfully:Demand/Lead Generation

- Other duties assigned to support ASEAN or APAC demand generation initiatives.
- Support enablement activities while co-working with Direct Sales team, Partner Sales team and Partners.
- Source, purchase and maintain inventory of Marketing Collateral and Corporate giveaways for use in ASEAN events.
- Support sales development reps and field sales with marketing material as needed for outbound calling efforts and sales customer visits.
- Ensure
role_fit_rationale: Demand gen/field marketing aligns, but B2B data management vendor—not preferred SaaS/tech industry.
skills_match_rationale: Strong demand gen, campaign execution, sales enablement, and multi-channel marketing experience directly applicable.
company_snapshot: Niche data management vendor, small global presence. Glassdoor reviews sparse (13), mixed on management and HR.
red_flags: JD appears truncated; unclear seniority expectations and team size.
standout_positives: Principal-level title signals seniority; regional ASEAN scope.

description:
Pride Global hiring Marketing Analytics and Operations Manager in Singapore, Singapore | LinkedIn

### Marketing Analytics and Operations Manager

Pride Global Singapore, Singapore

Apply

# Marketing Analytics and Operations Manager

#### Pride Global Singapore, Singapore 2 weeks ago 114 applicants See who Pride Global has hired for this role

Apply Save

- Report this job

Direct message the job poster from Pride Global

### Gealyn P.

HIRING FOR: Marketing Analytics and Operations Manager

📍Location: Singapore

📅Tenure: 5+ years relevant experience

🕒 Employment Type: Full-time, Hybrid, Morning shift

IMPORTANT: Only Singaporean locals or PR holders can apply.

JOB OVERVIEW

We are seeking a Marketing Analytics & Operations Manager to play a key role within a global business marketing organization. This position combines advanced data analytics expertise with strong operational and project management capabilities to drive measurable marketing impact.

The role involves stewarding marketing data, overseeing dashboards, conducting in-depth analysis, and delivering strategic insights to stakeholders. In addition, you will lead complex, cross-functional initiatives and help operationalize innovative AI tools to enhance go-to-market effectiveness. Success in this position requires analytical rigor, operational excellence, and the ability to navigate competing priorities in a fast-paced environment.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Data & Analytics

- Performance Reporting & Narrative Building: Manage quarterly measurement processes, continuously improve reporting operations, and present monthly and quarterly business updates by translating complex data into clear, compelling narratives.
- Insight Development: Synthesize quantitative and qualitative data to develop business hypotheses and deliver holistic insights on market opportunities and customer challenges.
- Advanced Analysis: Conduct deep-dive and ad-hoc analyses to identify trends, uncover opportunities, and provide actionable recommendations to optimize marketing performance.
- Dashboard Development: Design, build, and maintain interactive dashboards to track KPIs, measure marketing performance, and enable self-service analytics for stakeholders.
- Data Extraction & Integration: Extract, integrate, and manage data from marketing and sales platforms (e.g., marketing automation tools, CRM system
role_fit_rationale: Analytics/ops-heavy role diverges from candidate's marketing manager/growth marketing preferences. Staffing firm, not tech.
skills_match_rationale: Strong in CRM, dashboards, and campaign analytics; lacks deep advanced analytics and AI operationalization focus.
company_snapshot: Pride Global is a staffing/recruitment firm, not tech. Glassdoor and Nodeflair reviews are sparse/inaccessible.
red_flags: Staffing agency, not preferred industry; role skews heavily analytical
